choices.text: 18,000 ft MSL to FL600 (60,000 ft). IFR only; no VFR. ATC clearance required. Most airliners cruise here. Transponder + ADS-B required.

Need specific ATC clearance: "Cleared to enter Class Bravo." Mode C transponder + ADS-B Out required. VFR allowed but only with clearance. Surrounds busiest airports (JFK, LAX, ATL); upside-down wedding cake shape.

questions.explanation: Class B = explicit clearance + Mode C + ADS-B.
